stem: A circle has center O, and points A and B lie on the circle. The measure of arc AB is 60° and the length of arc AB is 5 inches. What is the circumference, in inches, of the circle?
rationale: The full circle has central angle 360°. The proportion 60/360 = 5/C gives 1/6 = 5/C, so C = 30 inches.
